problem id: 738f7c2d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10101011 -> 10101001
  11111001 -> 11100011
  10100111 -> 10011001
  11010001 -> 01000010
  11101001 -> 10100011
  10110110 -> 11011101
  10111111 -> 11111001
  11110111 -> 11011011
  00001101 -> 00110100
  00110010 -> 11001001

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 10110011
